setup.title: Saita walat ɗinka
setup.description: Ci gaba da Privy don ƙirƙirar walat ɗinka na {{network}}. Privy yana ba ka damar yin rajista da imel ko haɗa walat ɗin web3 da kake da shi. Ta kowace hanya, za ka iya ajiye, tara, da fitar da USDC.
setup.error: An kasa saita walat ɗinka. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
setup.securityNote: Walat ɗinka yana biyan kuɗi a kan Monad, kuma ana rubuta kowane motsi a cikin littafin ajiya. Ayyuka masu mahimmanci kamar fitar da kuɗi suna buƙatar sabon tabbaci.
setup.unavailableDescription: Ba a saita samar da walat a wannan tura ba tukuna. Da fatan a sake dubawa daga baya.

intro.getReadyDescription: MoolaHub yana aiki da USDC ta Monad. Saita walat ɗinka don ajiye, tara, da fitarwa.
intro.manageDescription: MoolaHub yana aiki da USDC ta Monad. Ƙara USDC a walat ɗinka, ko ka aika shi zuwa kowane adireshin walat na Monad.

receive.title: Karɓa
receive.subtitle: Ƙara USDC
receive.sendOnly: Aika <0>USDC a kan {{network}}</0> kaɗai zuwa wannan adireshin.
receive.instructions: Aika USDC zuwa adireshin ka da ke sama daga kowace walat na Monad.
receive.instructionsSync: Aika USDC zuwa adireshin ka da ke sama daga kowace walat na Monad, sannan ka duba shi:
receive.creditedDeposits: An shigar da ajiya {{count}} da jimillar {{amount}}
receive.noNewDeposits: Ba a sami sabbin ajiya ba

faucet.title: Famfon testnet
faucet.description: Karɓi USDC na gwaji don gwada abubuwa kafin kuɗi na gaske.

withdraw.title: Fitarwa
withdraw.subtitle: Aika USDC zuwa kowane adireshin Monad
withdraw.unavailable: Fitar da kuɗi a kan sarkar ba ya samuwa a wannan tura a yanzu.

footer.settle: Ana biyan kuɗi zuwa adireshin walat ɗinka na Monad, kuma ana rubuta kowane motsi a cikin littafin ajiya tare da nuni a kan sarkar.
footer.selfCustody: Walat ɗinka na kanka ne. Kai kake amincewa da kowace fitarwa ta hanyar sa hannu da kanka.
footer.stepUp: Fitar da kuɗi da biyan buri suna buƙatar sabon tabbaci (kalmar sirri, 2FA, ko lambar imel) kafin komai ya motsa.
footer.builtOnMonad: An gina shi a kan Monad

banner.title: Haɗa walat ɗinka don wannan zama
banner.description: Haɗa sau ɗaya yanzu kuma za ka iya ajiye, tara, da fitarwa ba tare da sake haɗawa ba har sai ka fita.

privyWithdraw.connectPrompt: Walat ɗinka na kanka ne. Haɗa shi don ka sa hannu kan fitarwar da kanka.

errors.unavailable: Fitar da kuɗi a kan sarkar ba ya samuwa a wannan tura.
errors.invalidAddress: Shigar da adireshin Monad mai inganci (yana farawa da 0x).
errors.invalidAmount: Shigar da adadin da ya dace.
errors.failed: Fitarwa ta gaza. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
